result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-dev-certs [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install  Installs (or updates) the ASP.NET Core development certificate.

commands.payload:

Usage:

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install  Installs (or updates) the ASP.NET Core development certificate.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Installs (or updates) the ASP.NET Core development certificate.

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-dev-certs install [options]

Options:
  --no-deps       Don't install required system tools. Print list of packages to install instead.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Installs (or updates) the ASP.NET Core development certificate.

Usage:
  dotnet-linux-dev-certs install [options]

Options:
  --no-deps       Don't install required system tools. Print list of packages to install instead.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
